title: Youmind 18007 Youmind 18007
prompt: A vibrant, {argument name="theme" default="fitness-themed"} digital collage featuring a central photo of a {argument name="subject action" default="smiling woman jogging along a park path"}, surrounded by a series of expressive "chibi-style" stickers. The woman and her animated counterparts are dressed in matching {argument name="outfit colors" default="black and pink"} athletic gear. Each sticker depicts a stage of a workout journey—from the energy of a "Morning Run!" and the determination of a deep stretch, to the exhaustion of being "Almost There" and the final triumph of crossing a line. The composition is decorated with playful pink hearts, sparkles, and motivational text like "Just Do It!" and "Crushing Goals!", creating a cheerful and inspiring narrative.
